시편 90:1.content: Lord, you have been our dwelling place for all generations.

시편 90:2.content: Before the mountains were born, before you had formed the earth and the world, even from everlasting to everlasting, you are God.

시편 90:3.content: You turn man to destruction, saying, “Return, you children of men.”

시편 90:4.content: For a thousand years in your sight are just like yesterday when it is past, like a watch in the night.

시편 90:5.content: You sweep them away as they sleep. In the morning they sprout like new grass.

시편 90:6.content: In the morning it sprouts and springs up. By evening, it is withered and dry.

시편 90:7.content: For we are consumed in your anger. We are troubled in your wrath.

시편 90:8.content: You have set our iniquities before you, our secret sins in the light of your presence.

시편 90:9.content: For all our days have passed away in your wrath. We bring our years to an end as a sigh.

시편 90:10.content: The days of our years are seventy, or even by reason of strength eighty years; yet their pride is but labor and sorrow, for it passes quickly, and we fly away.

시편 90:11.content: Who knows the power of your anger, your wrath according to the fear that is due to you?

시편 90:12.content: So teach us to count our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom.

시편 90:13.content: Relent, Yahweh! How long? Have compassion on your servants!

시편 90:14.content: Satisfy us in the morning with your loving kindness, that we may rejoice and be glad all our days.

시편 90:15.content: Make us glad for as many days as you have afflicted us, for as many years as we have seen evil.

시편 90:16.content: Let your work appear to your servants, your glory to their children.

시편 90:17.content: Let the favor of the Lord our God be on us. Establish the work of our hands for us. Yes, establish the work of our hands.
